name: regieleki
flavor_texts: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.
Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity.
text: Regieleki is the Electron Pokémon. It is a electric-type Pokémon. Abilities: transistor. Base stats — HP: 80, Attack: 100, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 100, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 200. Evolution line: regieleki. Lore: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power. Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity.
